# 4.2 Bill Repository & History

Doobie repositories for `bills`, `bill_cosponsors`, and `bill_subjects` tables with archive-before-overwrite to history tables. Uses `UpsertHelper` from `ingestion-common` and table/column names from `Tables.*` constants in `pipeline-models`. All DOs from `shared-models`.

## BillRepository[F[_]]

```
trait BillRepository[F[_]] {
  def upsert(bill: BillDO): F[Unit]
  def findByBillId(billId: String): F[Option[BillDO]]
  def findByBillIds(billIds: List[String]): F[List[BillDO]]
  def findBillsNeedingTextCheck(): F[List[BillDO]]
  def updateTextFields(
    billId: String,
    textUrl: String,
    textFormat: String,
    textVersionType: String,
    textDate: Instant,
    latestTextVersionId: UUID
  ): F[Unit]
}
```

**`upsert`:** Uses `UpsertHelper.upsertFragment` with `Tables.Bills`, conflict on `bill_id`, updates all non-key/non-audit columns, sets `updated_at = NOW()` on conflict.

**`findByBillId`:** SELECT by `bill_id`, returns `Option[BillDO]`. Used by `BillMetadataProcessor` for `ChangeDetector` comparison.

**`findByBillIds`:** SELECT by list of `bill_id` values, returns matching bills only.

**`findBillsNeedingTextCheck`:** Returns bills where `text_url IS NULL OR (text_version_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'ENR')`. Used by Project B (`bill-text-availability-checker`).

**`updateTextFields`:** Partial UPDATE of text columns only (`text_url`, `text_format`, `text_version_type`, `text_date`, `latest_text_version_id`, `updated_at`). Does not touch other metadata. Used by Project C after text download.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `upsert` inserts new bill | Insert → `findByBillId` → returns bill with all fields |
| `upsert` updates existing on conflict | Insert → upsert with changed title → verify title updated |
| `upsert` prevents duplicates | Upsert same `billId` twice → exactly 1 row |
| `upsert` sets `updated_at` on conflict | Upsert existing → `updated_at` changed |
| `findByBillId` returns `None` for missing | Unknown ID → `None` |
| `findByBillId` returns all fields | Insert → find → all fields match |
| `findByBillIds` returns matching bills | Insert 3 → find 2 → returns 2 |
| `findByBillIds` ignores missing IDs | Find [existing, missing] → only existing |
| `findBillsNeedingTextCheck` includes null text | `textUrl = None` → included |
| `findBillsNeedingTextCheck` excludes enrolled | `textVersionType = "ENR"` → excluded |
| `findBillsNeedingTextCheck` includes non-final | `textVersionType = "IH"` → included |
| `updateTextFields` leaves metadata unchanged | Update text → title unchanged, text fields set |
| All SQL uses `Tables.*` constants | No hardcoded table/column strings |

---

## BillHistoryArchiver[F[_]]

Archives current state of bill and related rows before overwrite.

```
trait BillHistoryArchiver[F[_]] {
  def archiveBill(billId: String): F[UUID]
}
```

**`archiveBill`:** (1) Generates `history_id` UUID. (2) Copies `bills` row to `bill_history` with `history_id` and `archived_at = NOW()`. (3) Copies `bill_cosponsors` rows to `bill_cosponsor_history`. (4) Copies `bill_subjects` rows to `bill_subject_history`. (5) All in single transaction. (6) Returns `history_id`. Shared `history_id` links bill, cosponsor, and subject snapshots for full reconstruction at any point. Called by `BillMetadataProcessor` before upserting changed bills, not for new bills.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Copies bill row to `bill_history` | Insert bill → archive → query `bill_history` → row exists |
| Copies cosponsors to `bill_cosponsor_history` | Insert bill + 3 cosponsors → archive → 3 history rows |
| Copies subjects to `bill_subject_history` | Insert bill + 5 subjects → archive → 5 history rows |
| All three history rows share same `history_id` | Archive → all history rows have same `history_id` |
| `archived_at` set to NOW() | Archive → `archived_at` within 1 second of test time |
| Transactional | Simulate mid-archive failure → no partial history rows |
| Archives bill-only when no cosponsors/subjects | Empty cosponsors/subjects → only `bill_history` row |
| Multiple archives produce distinct `history_id` | Archive twice → two different `history_id` values |
| Returns generated `history_id` | Return value matches UUID in history rows |

---

## BillCosponsorRepository[F[_]]

```
trait BillCosponsorRepository[F[_]] {
  def replaceAll(billId: String, cosponsors: List[BillCosponsorDO]): F[Unit]
  def findByBillId(billId: String): F[List[BillCosponsorDO]]
}
```

**`replaceAll`:** Deletes existing cosponsors for `bill_id`, inserts new set in single transaction. Old rows already archived by `BillHistoryArchiver`. Caller responsible for creating placeholder members for unknown `member_id` values (FK constraint).

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Inserts cosponsors for new bill | Insert 3 → `findByBillId` → returns 3 |
| Replaces cosponsors on re-ingest | Insert 3 → replaceAll with 2 different → returns 2 |
| Handles empty list (clears all) | replaceAll empty → find → returns empty |
| Transactional | Simulate mid-replace failure → old cosponsors intact |
| FK constraint enforced | Unknown `member_id` → FK violation error |

---

## BillSubjectRepository[F[_]]

```
trait BillSubjectRepository[F[_]] {
  def replaceAll(billId: String, subjects: List[BillSubjectDO]): F[Unit]
  def findByBillId(billId: String): F[List[BillSubjectDO]]
}
```

Same replace pattern as cosponsors: delete existing + insert new in one transaction.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Inserts subjects for new bill | Insert 5 → find → returns 5 |
| Replaces subjects on re-ingest | Insert 5 → replaceAll with 3 → returns 3 |
| Handles empty list | replaceAll empty → find → returns empty |
| Transactional | Simulate mid-replace failure → old subjects intact |

---

## Error Types

```
final case class BillUpsertFailed(
  billId: String,
  detail: String,
  cause: Option[Throwable] = None
) extends Exception(s"Failed to upsert bill $billId: $detail", cause.orNull)

final case class BillArchiveFailed(
  billId: String,
  detail: String,
  cause: Option[Throwable] = None
) extends Exception(s"Failed to archive bill history for $billId: $detail", cause.orNull)
```
